tools.name: ciyuwu_new_game
tools.description: Start a new game of 词与物 (Word and Thing). A text roguelike about AI censorship and self-expression. You are thrown into a grey world where speaking censored words is both your weapon and your wound. Returns initial state and game intro.

seed.description: Optional PRNG seed for deterministic play. Same seed + same commands = same result.

tools.name: ciyuwu_cmd
tools.description: Execute a command in 词与物 (Word and Thing). The game is a text roguelike about censorship, silence, and speaking truth. Key commands: 新角(new character), 重投(reroll stats), 来路 [名](choose origin), 确认(confirm), 前进(advance), 攻(attack), 防(defend), 术(skill), 逃(flee), 说 [话](speak - CORE MECHANIC), 回镇(return to town), 出镇 [层](enter area), 状态(status), 词库(word list), 帮助(help). Batch: 前进5(advance 5x), 攻3(attack 3x). Chain: 前进;说 我在(semicolon-separated). Each output ends with a JSON status bar showing current phase, HP, words, etc.

state.description: Current game state object (from previous ciyuwu_new_game or ciyuwu_cmd return). Pass the full state object back unchanged.

command.description: Game command to execute. Examples: '新角', '确认', '前进', '说 我在', '攻', '出镇 灰林', '前进5', '前进;说 我在;前进'. Say [word] is the core mechanic - speaking censored words damages enemies but hurts you too.
